forecast.miss_summary: Only a 75-90 versus 65-85 total range was explicitly recorded. The reconstructed category forecast missed the three-milestone sweep, understated Codex's award/card conversion, and overestimated Claude's slow animal-microbe ceiling.

key_turning_points.title: Colonizer Training Camp enabled Builder, and Water Splitting Plant made oxygen deterministic
Towing A Comet plus greenery 40 enabled the Gardener claim and the closure pivot
Terraformer and Scientist completed the milestone sweep and locked the first award lane
Ice Asteroid, two aquifers, Landlord, and post-terraform liquidation completed a 102-point finish

counterfactuals.change: Play Equatorial Magnetizer one generation earlier and activate it twice without displacing an award or closure action
Play Designed Microorganisms before its temperature window closes, accepting the opportunity cost against the Gen 7 milestone and space line
Write the entire Gen 10 closure, award, direct-VP, production, and final-greenery sequence before the first action

rule_updates: If the Gen 6 forecast is only a total-score range, then write category estimates for both players before taking another setup action.
If a draft response says the selection can still be changed, then wait for a genuinely new card set instead of selecting from the displayed remainder.
If compact state reports mc as zero while paid actions remain legal, then use raw_player_model megacredits for the liquidation budget.
If the game can end this generation, then script closure, awards, direct VP, post-terraform actions, production, and final greenery before acting.

active_hypotheses.hypothesis: Earlier explicit macro calls reduce hybrid drift and improve late conversion quality.
active_hypotheses.result: The outscale call had a specific oxygen-board fallback and pivoted cleanly into a Generation 10 close.

active_hypotheses.hypothesis: Early board and city anchors can offset or prevent a card-VP deficit.
active_hypotheses.result: The anchors supported 7 city VP, 7 greenery VP, and a 5-point Landlord win while Codex also won card VP.

active_hypotheses.hypothesis: Continuing actions after terraforming completion materially changes outcomes.
active_hypotheses.result: Post-terraform cards and the final greenery added 3 VP, though they were not needed to preserve the win.

endgame_review.best_missed_conversion: No clear positive conversion was missed; the main process gap was failing to script the entire award and direct-VP sequence before the first Gen 10 action.

tool_mismatches.expected: The restarted helper would submit the live lowercase megacredits payment field.
tool_mismatches.actual: The loaded helper used stale payment normalization and the server rejected the payment type.
tool_mismatches.mitigation: Use an outer-or submit_raw_entity payload with the full lowercase payment object and reload the MCP client before the next game.

tool_mismatches.expected: Compact mc would show the live megacredit balance.
tool_mismatches.actual: Compact mc remained zero while raw_player_model exposed the real lowercase megacredits value.
tool_mismatches.mitigation: Read the raw balance or fix compact normalization before relying on affordability summaries.

tool_mismatches.expected: A new draft round would be distinguishable from a still-editable current selection.
tool_mismatches.actual: The remainder of the current hand looked actionable and caused an accidental selection change.
tool_mismatches.mitigation: Wait for the card set to change whenever the title says the current selection can still be changed.
